visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a large, grey and white Judy Hopps plush head with oversized purple eyes. A young woman wearing a black beret and a purple off-the-shoulder top lowers the plush to reveal her smiling face in a bright warehouse retail environment. (2) A second woman in a white lace dress enters the frame holding a large orange Nick Wilde fox plush. They both stand together, showcasing the two massive character pillows against their upper bodies while gesturing excitedly toward the camera in the aisle of a store. (3) The camera captures close-up details of the plushies, focusing on the soft texture of the fabric and the embroidered facial features. A price tag and branding labels are visible as the women point out the craftsmanship of the noses and eyes under bright fluorescent lighting. (4) One woman demonstrates a hidden pocket feature in the ear of the fox plush by sliding her hand into a gap. They continue to pose and play with the pillows, eventually holding them up as masks before a final shot of both characters stacked together in a dynamic display.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 要買迪士尼周邊的 不要再去迪士尼了. (2) [Variety]: 超巨大. [Subtitle]: 你的行李箱裝得下這麼大的嗎?. (3) [Slogan]: 好市多超便宜. [Variety]: 動物方城市抱枕. [Subtitle]: 動物方城市的大頭抱枕 645元. (4) [Subtitle]: 有兔兔 還有尼克. (5) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它的毛 他剛剛忘記尼克的名字 他剛剛說哩. (6) [Subtitle]: 我說狐狸. (7) [Subtitle]: 可是不得不說 他做的真好 首先他的毛非常的順. (8) [Subtitle]: 然后他的五官做的很立體 鼻子也是精緻小巧. (9) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它的臉都做得好好看 645元 不用3000日幣. (10) [Variety]: 哇. [Subtitle]: 重點是... 我可以幫它掏耳朵. (11) [Subtitle]: 裡面有一個縫隙 手放進去還滿舒服. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 它的耳朵 也是有做這種支撐的 所以放在椅子上也很好看. (13) [Subtitle]: 超大的 很好看喔 或者萬聖節 你就直接打扮成兔子吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators presenting, 2 distant female shoppers blurred in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Woman 1: Wearing a black beret and a purple off-the-shoulder top. Woman 2: Wearing a white off-the-shoulder lace dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse store interior (Costco) with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving, and various household goods like bedding and pillows visible on the racks.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Rapid female narration starts immediately over a bright, rhythmic acoustic guitar track. The voice is high-energy and processed with a clear studio quality, masking the low-level room tone of the store. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as a visual graphic pops up on screen. The speaker's pitch rises during the exclamation, indicating excitement about the product size. (3) A clear 'ding' bell sound effect is heard when the price is mentioned, punctuated by a quick cut in the vocal track. The background music maintains a steady, light percussive beat throughout. (4) A short cartoon-style 'boing' or comedic bounce effect accompanies the demonstration of the plush ear pocket. The speaker continues at a high words-per-minute rate with almost no silence until the audio fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price Reveal -> Feature Close-up -> Surprise Detail -> Use Case Suggestion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend Zootopia-themed plush pillows sold at Costco, emphasizing their large size, high quality, and affordability compared to theme park merchandise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the store (Costco), shows the brand logo (Hoyacasa), highlights the specific price point, and encourages viewers to buy the product there instead of at Disney.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy retail discovery vlog designed for social media engagement, combining fast-paced editing with informative price and quality comparisons.
